message:
fix: restore complete AI CLI tool suite in default container

Ensure all AI agents from original Dockerfile are included:

AI CLI Tools Installed:
- @sourcegraph/amp - Sourcegraph Amp
- @qwen-code/qwen-code - Qwen Code
- @google/gemini-cli - Google Gemini CLI
- @github/copilot - GitHub Copilot
- @openai/codex - OpenAI Codex
- @anthropic-ai/claude-code - Claude Code (corrected package name)

This maintains feature parity with the original custom Dockerfile
while using Microsoft's maintained devcontainer features for the
base development environment.

🤖 Generated with [Claude Code](https://claude.com/claude-code)

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,9 +62,13 @@
     ],
     "ai-tools": [
       "echo 'Installing AI CLI tools...'",
-      "npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-cli",
-      "pip install openai anthropic",
-      "echo 'AI tools installed successfully'"
+      "npm install -g @sourcegraph/amp",
+      "npm install -g @qwen-code/qwen-code",
+      "npm install -g @google/gemini-cli",
+      "npm install -g @github/copilot",
+      "npm install -g @openai/codex",
+      "npm install -g @anthropic-ai/claude-code",
+      "echo 'All AI CLI tools installed successfully'"
     ]
   },
   "postCreateCommand": [
